programs.title: The Tall Man
programs.desc: A nurse's (Jessica Biel) son is the latest victim in a series of child abductions.

programs.title: The Last Thing Mary Saw
programs.desc: In the spring of 1840, a family questions the circumstances of the death of their matriarch.

programs.title: Kindred

programs.title: And Now the Screaming Starts
programs.desc: Doctor (Peter Cushing) helps lord and bride (Stephanie Beacham) cope with hand and curse.

programs.title: The Other Lamb
programs.desc: A young woman born into an all-female cult beings to question the teachings of her leader.

programs.title: The Pact
programs.desc: A woman contends with a supernatural force and her sister's disappearance.
